title: coreopsis grandiflora
intro: Coreopsis grandiflora, also known as the large-flowered coreopsis, is a perennial flowering plant native to North America, characterized by its bright yellow or pink flowers. The plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and sesquiterpenes. The health benefits of Coreopsis grandiflora include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial activity, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Coreopsis grandiflora can be prepared in various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
